description_long: This chaise features a modern, geometric design with a low-profile rectangular base and a slightly elevated backrest. The main body is composed of a muted peach or tan color, accented by darker reddish-brown and beige sections, giving it a blocky, stylized appearance. The seating area is a dark, flat surface, likely intended to represent a cushioned or upholstered section for comfort. The backrest is angled and integrated into the frame, with subtle angular transitions rather than a separate, distinct piece. The sides are broad and flat, with no visible armrests, and the base appears solid and continuous, lacking visible legs or supports. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or public relaxation areas.
description: A modern, blocky chaise with a muted peach and dark seat, featuring an integrated angled backrest and no visible armrests or legs. Its minimalist design is ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat seat and the angled backrest, with the blocky frame and no visible armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low profile, the sloped backrest, and the continuous base with no visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the squared-off back and the geometric, solid structure of the chaise.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left, showing the same low, angular profile and integrated backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is integrated into the main frame, slightly angled, and features a geometric, blocky shape with no visible segmentation or decorative elements. It rises modestly above the seat, providing support without being overly tall.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise has no visible legs; instead, it features a solid, continuous base that extends to the ground, giving it a grounded and stable appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery appears solid in color with no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting, and has a smooth, matte finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no separate or loose cushions visible; the seat and backrest appear to be a single, integrated cushioned surface.
